title: Pack of 4 Ice Fountains | Cake Topper Decoration | Prosecco Champagne Fountain | Sparkling Fountain | Gold or Silver | Birthdays, Christmas, New Year and Weddings (Gold)
features: Turn your cake or cocktail into a fantastic display of sparkle. Perfect for parties, clubs, pubs, bars, restaurants and weddings. Made from high quality materials. Suitable for cakes, puddings and champagne bottles.
Each pack contains 4 x 12 cm ice fountains with cake spike. Choose from Gold or Silver sparkle effect fountain flames. Low smoke, No odour, Easy to light. Burn time approx. 60 seconds.
Suitable for Indoor or Outdoor use (please read safety instruction on pack before use). CAT F1 - Low Risk. Non-handheld only.
description: Product description Turn your cake or cocktail into a fantastic display of sparkle. Perfect for parties, clubs, pubs, bars, restaurants and weddings. Made from high quality materials. Suitable for cakes, puddings and champagne bottles. Each pack contains 4 x 12 cm ice fountains with cake spike. Choose from Gold or Silver sparkle effect fountain flames. Low smoke, No odour, Easy to light. Burn time approx. 60 seconds. Suitable for Indoor or Outdoor use (please read safety instruction on pack before use). CAT F1 - Low Risk - BS EN 15947:2015 compliant. Packaging may vary. Safety Warning Not for sale to persons under 16 years
